CGU.title: General Conditions of Use
CGU.helpText: If you have any questions regarding our T&Cs, our team is at your disposal.

introduction.title: Introduction and acceptance
introduction.p1: The purpose of these General Conditions of Use (hereinafter referred to as “CGU”) is to define the terms and conditions under which the NESTHUB platform makes real estate connection services available to its users in Tunisia.
introduction.p2: By accessing or using the NESTHUB website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use our services.
introduction.warning: These T&Cs apply to all users of the platform: tenants, owners and unconnected visitors.

services.title: Description of services
services.description: NESTHUB is a Tunisian technological platform facilitating the rental of real estate between individuals. Our services include, but are not limited to:
services.item1: The publication of rental advertisements with photos, videos and detailed descriptions.
services.item2: A secure messaging system with anti-leak detection of personal data.
services.item3: A digital reservation and rental file management tool.
services.item4: Secure payment solutions via Konnect, with escrow deposit management.
services.item5: An identity verification system by OCR (CIN / Passport).
services.item6: A reliability score and trust badges for verified users.
services.item7: Artificial intelligence tools for fraud detection and recommendation.

owners.title: Owners
owners.item1: Provide accurate and truthful information about the property.
owners.item2: Legally own rental rights to the published property.
owners.item3: Respect standards of decency and Tunisian legislation.
owners.item4: Do not publish fictitious or misleading advertisements.
owners.item5: Respond to reservation requests within a reasonable time.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.item2: Use the platform fairly and honestly.
tenants.item3: Make all payments exclusively through NESTHUB.
tenants.item4: Respect the internal regulations of the rented property.
tenants.item5: Report any issues through official channels.

prohibited.title: Prohibited behaviors
prohibited.text: It is strictly prohibited to share personal contact details (numbers, emails, IBAN) in messaging, circumvent the payment system, publish false advertisements or harass other users. Any breach may result in suspension or permanent ban of the account.

paiements.title: Financial Conditions
paiements.quote: The security of your transactions is our priority. All payments made on NESTHUB are processed by Konnect, an approved payment provider in Tunisia.

commission.title: Service fees
commission.text: NESTHUB charges a 20% commission on each transaction. It is automatically deducted from the amount paid to the owner and clearly displayed before any confirmation.

deposit.title: Bail (Receiver)
deposit.text: The deposit is collected upon payment and placed in escrow. It is automatically returned at the end of your stay without dispute, or arbitrated by NESTHUB in the event of a conflict with photo supporting documents.

payout.title: Payments to owners
payout.text: Payments are made after confirmation of check-in, with a minimum threshold of 50 DT. A detailed statement is available in the owner dashboard.

refund.title: Refunds
refund.text: Refunds are calculated according to the owner's cancellation policy. The delivery time is 3 to 5 working days. NESTHUB may force a refund in the event of a proven dispute.

responsabilite.title: Limitation of Liability
responsabilite.description: NESTHUB acts as a content host and technical intermediary. The platform cannot be held responsible for:
responsabilite.item1: From the content of advertisements published by users.
responsabilite.item2: Non-execution or poor execution of the lease concluded between the parties.
responsabilite.item3: Indirect damages resulting from the use of the service.
responsabilite.item4: Temporary interruptions of the service for maintenance or force majeure.
responsabilite.item5: The quality, conformity or actual condition of the goods rented.

resiliation.title: Termination
resiliation.description: The user can delete their account at any time from their settings. NESTHUB reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account in the event of:

reason1.title: Non-compliance with the T&Cs
reason1.desc: Violation of the rules of use.

reason3.title: System bypass
reason3.desc: Payments or contact sharing outside NH.

resiliation.process: Termination follows the progressive escalation process: warning → temporary suspension → permanent ban, except serious fraud justifying immediate action.

donnees.title: Personal data
donnees.description: NESTHUB is committed to protecting your personal data. Your rights include:
donnees.footer: To exercise your rights, consult our

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: At NestHub, protecting your personal data is a top priority. This policy details how we collect, use and protect your information, in accordance with applicable regulations.
Privacy.helpText: Questions about your data? Our DPO is at your disposal.

collecte.title: Collection of personal data
collecte.description: We collect the information that you provide to us directly when creating your account, publishing an ad or requesting a rental:

identite.label: Identify
identite.desc: Last name, first name, date of birth.

coordonnees.label: Contact details
coordonnees.desc: Email address, telephone number, postal address.

profil.label: Profile
profil.desc: Photography, bio, tenant type, search preferences, rental history.

documents.label: Identity documents
documents.desc: CIN or Passport uploaded for OCR verification. Encrypted storage.

financieres.label: Financial data
financieres.desc: Payment history via Konnect (no banking data stored).

comportementales.label: Behavioral data
comportementales.desc: Search history, ads viewed, reservations made, reviews.

messagerie.label: Email data
messagerie.desc: Exchanges analyzed by anti-leak AI to block data sharing.

utilisation.title: Why do we use your data?
utilisation.description: Your data is subject to automated processing for the following purposes:

1.title: Connection
1.desc: Facilitate the connection between owners and tenants, manage requests.

2.title: Identity verification
2.desc: Analyze your documents by OCR to assign the “Verified” badge.

3.title: Reliability score
3.desc: Calculate your reliability score (0-100) for a trusted system.

4.title: Security & Anti-fraud
4.desc: Detect fraudulent behavior and protect against scams.

5.title: Personalization
5.desc: Recommend ads tailored to your preferences.

6.title: Payments & Deposit
6.desc: Process payments through Konnect, manage escrow.

7.title: Notifications
7.desc: Inform you of events related to your reservations.

8.title: Support & Disputes
8.desc: Process your tickets and arbitrate disputes.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: NestHub uses cookies to ensure the proper functioning of the site, measure the audience and offer you content adapted to your real estate searches.

essentiels.name: Essential Cookies
essentiels.desc: Necessary for navigation, authentication (Clerk) and session security.

analytiques.name: Analytical Cookies
analytiques.desc: To understand how you use our site and improve our services.

personnalisation.name: Personalization Cookies
personnalisation.desc: To remember your preferences and personalize recommendations.

droits.title: Your rights (GDPR)
droits.description: In accordance with data protection regulations, you have the following rights, all accessible from your personal NestHub space:

acces.title: Access
acces.desc: View all your personal data from your profile.

rectification.title: Correction
rectification.desc: Change your incorrect information in your settings.

suppression.title: Deletion
suppression.desc: Request deletion of your account and data.

portabilite.title: Portability
portabilite.desc: Export all of your data in JSON/CSV format.

limitation.title: Limitation
limitation.desc: Request restriction of processing in certain cases.

securite.title: Security of your data
securite.description: NestHub implements rigorous technical and organizational measures to guarantee the security of your data:

auth.title: Secure authentication
auth.desc: Session management via Clerk with 2FA support.

audits.title: Regular audits
audits.desc: Security audits and admin access logs maintained.

messagerie.title: Protected Messaging
messagerie.desc: AI detects and hides sensitive data in chat.

paiements.title: Secure payments
paiements.desc: No banking data stored, everything is managed by Konnect.

ia.title: AI & Automation
ia.warning: NestHub uses artificial intelligence systems that process some of your data in an automated manner.

detection.title: Data leak detection
detection.desc: Real-time analysis of messages to detect and hide sensitive data.

fraude.title: Fraud detection
fraude.desc: Scanning ads to detect suspicious behavior.

recommandations.title: Personalized recommendations
recommandations.desc: Using browsing data to recommend ads.

contact.title: Need help with your data?
contact.description: Our Data Protection Officer (DPO) is available to answer all your questions about the collection, use or deletion of your personal data.
